name: X Thought Leadership Engine
description: Reactive X/Twitter thought leadership engine - monitors target accounts, correlates with positions.db, generates 4-variant drafts, HITL approval via SMS, posts and learns voice over time.
objective: Build a system where V monitors tweets from industry thought leaders, gets AI-generated reply drafts correlated with his positions database, approves via SMS, and the system learns his voice preferences over time.

workers.description: Create tweets.db with tables: monitored_accounts, tweets, position_correlations, drafts, posted_tweets, voice_samples. Include indexes for efficient querying.
Python module wrapping X API v2 - auth, rate limiting, get_user_tweets(), post_reply(), get_user_id(). Uses X_API_KEY, X_API_SECRET, X_BEARER_KEY env vars. Include retry logic and error handling.
Module that takes tweet text, queries positions.db embeddings, returns top-N matching positions with similarity scores. Uses semantic similarity. Returns position ID, title, insight, and score.
Create 4 voice variant configs (supportive, challenging, spicy, comedic) with few-shot examples, tone markers, and transformation rules. Build on existing N5/scripts/voice_transformer.py patterns.

Takes tweet + matched positions + voice configs, generates 4 variant drafts (supportive, challenging, spicy, comedic). Includes anti-boring/anti-repetition checks against posted_tweets history. Max 280 chars per draft. Uses Zo Ask API for generation.
Scheduled agent that polls monitored accounts every 15min, stores new tweets in tweets.db, triggers correlation scoring. Runs 8am-10pm ET only. Tracks last_seen_id per account to avoid duplicates.

Formats drafts for SMS delivery (all 4 variants with labels). Parses responses: 1-4 to select variant, 'skip' or 0 to skip, keyword + suggestion for refinement request. Handles expiry (EOD). Maintains pending queue in drafts table.

Posts approved tweets as replies to original tweet (appears in target's mentions). Records to posted_tweets with full metadata: variant chosen, position matched, original tweet, timestamp. Handles API errors gracefully with retry.

Main scheduled agent tying the flow together: poll → correlate → generate drafts → SMS notify. Creates Zo scheduled agent running every 15min during 8am-10pm ET. Handles the full pipeline coordination.
Parses X data archive (tweet.js JSON or DuckDB dataset format), extracts V's historical tweets, stores in voice_samples table for voice learning. Handles both formats V mentioned.

Analyzes posted tweets + variant selections over time. Tracks which variants V prefers by topic/context. Generates style insights report. Can suggest voice_variants.yaml refinements based on patterns.
Create 'X Thought Leader.prompt.md' for manual operations: add/remove monitored accounts, check status, force poll, view pending queue, see voice learning stats. Standard N5 prompt format.

context.sms_response_format: 1-4 to select, 0 or 'skip' to skip, keyword+suggestion for refinement
context.position_filters: none - all 105 positions eligible, HITL is the filter
context.anti_patterns: track posted tweets and originals to avoid repetition/predictability
